27 // #define SPLIT_CONTAINER
28 /* La version avec SPLIT_CONTAINER fait moins d'appel virtuel mais consomme un peu plus de m���moire (tableau de vectorisation).
29  * Factuellement est sans SPLIT_CONTAINER est plus rapide de environ 5%
30  * NB: Si l'on supprime d���finitivement SPLIT_CONTAINER, l'API de IAbstractFamily peut ���tre simplifier des m���thodes uids
31  * et owners vectoris���es (ainsi que ses impl���mentations).
32  */
33

40 const Integer BasicIndexManager:: m_mesh_kind_shift = 32;
41 const Integer BasicIndexManager::m_family_kind_shift = 32*32;

46 BasicIndexManager::ItemAbstractFamily::
47 ItemAbstractFamily(const Arcane::IItemFamily * family)
48 : m_family(family)
49 , m_item_internals(const_cast<Arcane::IItemFamily *>(family)->itemsInternal())
50 {
51 //#ifndef NO_USER_WARNING
52 //#ifndef WIN32
53 //#warning "TODO: const_cast due to ill formed view/itemsInternal methods : const requested"
54 //#endif
55 //#endif /* NO_USER_WARNING */
56 }

58 IIndexManager::IAbstractFamily *
59 BasicIndexManager::ItemAbstractFamily::
60 clone() const
61 {
62  return new ItemAbstractFamily(*this);
63 }
64 
65 Int32
66 BasicIndexManager::ItemAbstractFamily::
67 maxLocalId() const
68 {
69  return m_family->maxLocalId();
70 }
71 
72 void
73 BasicIndexManager::ItemAbstractFamily::
74 uniqueIdToLocalId(Int32ArrayView localIds, Int64ConstArrayView uniqueIds) const
75 {
76  m_family->itemsUniqueIdToLocalId(localIds, uniqueIds, true);
77 }
78 
79 IIndexManager::IAbstractFamily::Item
80 BasicIndexManager::ItemAbstractFamily::
81 item(Int32 localId) const
82 {
83  Arcane::ItemInternal * internal = m_item_internals[localId];
84  return Item(internal->uniqueId(), internal->owner());
85 }
86 
87 SafeConstArrayView<Integer>
88 BasicIndexManager::ItemAbstractFamily::
89 owners(Int32ConstArrayView localIds) const
90 {
91  SharedArray<Integer> result(localIds.size());
92  for(Integer i=0;i<localIds.size();++i)
93  {
94  Arcane::ItemInternal * internal = m_item_internals[localIds[i]];
95  result[i] = internal->owner();
96  }
97  return result;
98 }
99 
100 SafeConstArrayView<Int64>
101 BasicIndexManager::ItemAbstractFamily::
102 uids(Int32ConstArrayView localIds) const
103 {
104  SharedArray<Int64> result(localIds.size());
105  for(Integer i=0;i<localIds.size();++i)
106  {
107  Arcane::ItemInternal * internal = m_item_internals[localIds[i]];
108  result[i] = internal->uniqueId();
109  }
110  return SafeConstArrayView<Int64>(result);
111 }
112 
113 SafeConstArrayView<Int32>
114 BasicIndexManager::ItemAbstractFamily::
115 allLocalIds() const
116 {
117  return m_family->allItems().view().localIds();
118 }

127 class BasicIndexManager::MyEntryImpl :
128  public IIndexManager::EntryImpl
129  {
130  friend class BasicIndexManager;
131  public:
133  MyEntryImpl(const String name, const IAbstractFamily * family, const Integer creationIndex, BasicIndexManager * manager, Integer kind)
134  : m_creation_index(creationIndex)
135  , m_manager(manager)
136  , m_name(name)
137  , m_family(family)
138  , m_kind(kind)
139  , m_is_defined(family->maxLocalId(), false)
140  , m_own_size(0)
141  , m_size(0)
142  {
143  ;
144  }
145 
146  virtual ~MyEntryImpl()
147  {
148  ;
149  }
150 
151  ConstArrayView<Integer> getOwnIndexes() const
152  {
153 #ifndef USE_ARCANE_V3
154  return ConstArrayView<Integer>(m_own_size, m_all_indices.begin());
155 #else
156  return ConstArrayView<Integer>(m_own_size, m_all_indices.data());
157 #endif
158  }
159 
160  ConstArrayView<Integer> getOwnLocalIds() const
161  {
162 #ifndef USE_ARCANE_V3
163  return ConstArrayView<Integer>(m_own_size, m_all_items.begin());
164 #else
165  return ConstArrayView<Integer>(m_own_size, m_all_items.data());
166 #endif
167  }
168 
169  ConstArrayView<Integer> getAllIndexes() const
170  {
171  return ConstArrayView<Integer>(m_all_indices);
172  }
173 
174  ConstArrayView<Integer> getAllLocalIds() const
175  {
176  return ConstArrayView<Integer>(m_all_items);
177  }
178 
179  void addTag(const String &tagname, const String &tagvalue)
180  {
181  m_tags[tagname] = tagvalue;
182  }
183 
184  void removeTag(const String &tagname)
185  {
186  m_tags.erase(tagname);
187  }
188 
189  bool hasTag(const String &tagname)
190  {
191  return m_tags.find(tagname) != m_tags.end();
192  }
193 
194  String tagValue(const String & tagname)
195  {
196  std::map<String,String>::const_iterator i = m_tags.find(tagname);
197  if (i==m_tags.end())
198  return String();
199  return i->second;
200  }
201 
202  String getName() const
203  {
204  return m_name;
205  }
206 
207  Integer getKind() const
208  {
209  // convention negative value for abstract family
210  if (m_kind < 0)
211  return -1; // this is an abstract entity
212  else
213  return (m_kind % m_family_kind_shift) % m_mesh_kind_shift;
214  }
215 
216  const IAbstractFamily & getFamily() const
217  {
218  return *m_family;
219  }
220 
221  IIndexManager * manager() const
222  {
223  return m_manager;
224  }
225 
226  protected:
228 
229  void reserve(const Integer n)
230  {
231  m_size = n;
232  }
233 
235 
236  void finalize(const EntryIndexMap & entryIndex)
237  {
238  m_all_items.resize(m_size);
239  m_all_indices.resize(m_size);
240 
241  Integer own_i = 0;
242  Integer ghost_i = m_size;
243  for(EntryIndexMap::const_iterator i = entryIndex.begin(); i != entryIndex.end(); ++i)
244  if (i->m_entry == this)
245  {
246  const Integer local_id = i->m_localid;
247  const Integer index = i->m_index;
248  const bool is_own = m_manager->isOwn(*i);
249  if (is_own)
250  {
251  m_all_items[own_i] = local_id;
252  m_all_indices[own_i] = index;
253  ++own_i;
254  }
255  else
256  {
257  --ghost_i;
258  m_all_items[ghost_i] = local_id;
259  m_all_indices[ghost_i] = index;
260  }
261  }
262  m_own_size = own_i;
263  ARCANE_ASSERT((own_i == ghost_i),("Not merged insertion"));
264 
265  // // Tri de la partie own des indices
266  // typedef Array<Integer>::iterator iterator;
267  // DualRandomIterator<iterator,iterator> begin(m_all_indices.begin(), m_all_items.begin());
268  // DualRandomIterator<iterator,iterator> end = begin + m_own_size;
269  // Comparator<DualRandomIterator<iterator,iterator> > comparator;
270  // std::sort(begin, end, comparator);
271  }
272 
273  void resetFamily(const IAbstractFamily * family)
274  {
275  m_family = family;
276  }
277 
278  protected:
279 
280  void reserveLid(const Integer count) {
281  m_defined_lids.reserve(m_defined_lids.size() + count);
282 #ifdef SPLIT_CONTAINER
283  m_defined_indexes.reserve(m_defined_indexes.size() + count);
284 #endif /* SPLIT_CONTAINER */
285  }
286  bool isDefinedLid(const Integer localId) const { return m_is_defined[localId]; }
287 
288  void defineLid(const Integer localId, const Integer pos) {
289  m_is_defined[localId] = true;
290 #ifdef SPLIT_CONTAINER
291  m_defined_lids.add(localId);
292  m_defined_indexes.add(pos);
293 #else /* SPLIT_CONTAINER */
294  m_defined_lids.add(std::make_pair(localId,pos));
295 #endif /* SPLIT_CONTAINER */
296  }
297 
298  void undefineLid(const Integer localId) {
299  m_is_defined[localId] = false;
300  for(Integer i=0;i<m_defined_lids.size();++i)
301  {
302 #ifdef SPLIT_CONTAINER
303  if (m_defined_lids[i] == localId)
304 #else /* SPLIT_CONTAINER */
305  if (m_defined_lids[i].first == localId)
306 #endif /* SPLIT_CONTAINER */
307  {
308  m_defined_lids[i] = m_defined_lids.back();
309  m_defined_lids.resize(m_defined_lids.size()-1);
310 #ifdef SPLIT_CONTAINER
311  m_defined_indexes[i] = m_defined_indexes.back();
312  m_defined_indexes.resize(m_defined_lids.size()-1);
313 #endif /* SPLIT_CONTAINER */
314  return ;
315  }
316  }
317  throw FatalErrorException(A_FUNCINFO,"Inconsistent state : cannot find id to remove");
318  }
319 
320 #ifdef SPLIT_CONTAINER
321  const Array<Integer> & definedLids() const { return m_defined_lids; }
322  const Array<Integer> & definedIndexes() const { return m_defined_indexes; }
323 #else /* SPLIT_CONTAINER */
324  const SharedArray<std::pair<Integer, Integer> > & definedLids() const { return m_defined_lids; }
325 #endif /* SPLIT_CONTAINER */
326 
327 
328  void freeDefinedLids() {
329 #ifdef SPLIT_CONTAINER
330  m_defined_lids.dispose();
331  m_defined_indexes.dispose();
332 #else /* SPLIT_CONTAINER */
333  m_defined_lids.dispose();
334 #endif /* SPLIT_CONTAINER */
335  std::vector<bool>().swap(m_is_defined);
336  }
337 
338  private:
339  std::map<String,String> m_tags;
340  Integer m_creation_index;
341  BasicIndexManager * m_manager;
342  const String m_name;
343  const IAbstractFamily * m_family;
344  const Integer m_kind;
345 
346  std::vector<bool> m_is_defined;
347 #ifdef SPLIT_CONTAINER
348  SharedArray<Integer> m_defined_lids;
349  SharedArray<Integer> m_defined_indexes;
350 #else /* SPLIT_CONTAINER */
351  SharedArray<std::pair<Integer, Integer> > m_defined_lids;
352 #endif /* SPLIT_CONTAINER */
353 
354  private:
355  SharedArray<Integer> m_all_items;
356  SharedArray<Integer> m_all_indices;
357  Integer m_own_size;
358  Integer m_size;
359 
360  public:
361  Integer getCreationIndex() const { return m_creation_index; }
362  };
363

367 struct BasicIndexManager::EntrySendRequest
368 {
369  EntrySendRequest() : comm(NULL), count(0)
370  {
371  ;
372  }
373 
374  ~EntrySendRequest()
375  {
376  // Valide m���me si comm vaut NULL
377  delete comm;
378  }
379 
380  EntrySendRequest(const EntrySendRequest & esr)
381  : comm(NULL)
382  , count(esr.count)
383  {
384  ARCANE_ASSERT((esr.comm == NULL),("Bad initialization"));
385  }
386 
387  SerializeMessage * comm;
388  Integer count;
389 
390 private:
391  void operator=(const EntrySendRequest &);
392 };
393

396 struct BasicIndexManager::EntryRecvRequest
397 {
398  EntryRecvRequest() : comm(NULL)
399  {
400  ;
401  }
402 
403  ~EntryRecvRequest()
404  {
405  // Valide m���me si comm vaut NULL
406  delete comm;
407  }

409  EntryRecvRequest(const EntrySendRequest & err)
410  : comm(NULL)
411  {
412  ARCANE_ASSERT((err.comm == NULL),("Bad initialization"));
413  }
414 
415  SerializeMessage * comm;
416  Int64SharedArray ids;
417 
418 private:

420 };

425 class BasicIndexManager::MyEntryEnumeratorImpl
426  : public IIndexManager::EntryEnumeratorImpl
427  {
428  protected:
429  EntrySet::const_iterator m_iter, m_end;
430  public:
431  MyEntryEnumeratorImpl(const EntrySet & entries)
432  : m_iter(entries.begin()),
433  m_end(entries.end())
434  {
435  ;
436  }
437 
438  void moveNext() { ++m_iter; }
439 
440  bool hasNext() const { return m_iter != m_end; }
441 
442  EntryImpl * get() const { return m_iter->second; }
443  };

448 BasicIndexManager::
449 BasicIndexManager(IParallelMng * parallelMng)
450 : m_parallel_mng(parallelMng)
451 , m_local_owner(0)
452 , m_state(Undef)
453 , m_trace(NULL)
454 , m_local_entry_count(0)
455 , m_global_entry_count(0)
456 , m_global_entry_offset(0)
457 , m_local_removed_entry_count(0)
458 , m_global_removed_entry_count(0)
459 , m_max_null_index_opt(false)
460 , m_creation_index(0)
461 , m_abstract_family_base_kind(0)
462 {
463  this->init();
464 }
465 
466 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
467 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
468 
469 BasicIndexManager::
470 ~BasicIndexManager()
471 {
472  this->init();
473 }
474 
475 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
476 
477 void
478 BasicIndexManager::
479 init()
480 {
481  m_local_owner = m_parallel_mng->commRank();
482 
483  m_state = Initialized;
484 
485  m_local_entry_count = 0;
486  m_global_entry_count = 0;
487  m_global_entry_offset = 0;
488  m_local_removed_entry_count = 0;
489  m_global_removed_entry_count = 0;
490 
491  // Destruction des structure de type entry
492  for(EntrySet::iterator i = m_entry_set.begin(); i != m_entry_set.end(); ++i)
493  {
494  delete i->second;
495  }
496  m_entry_set.clear();
497 
498  m_abstract_family_base_kind = 0;
499  m_item_family_meshes.clear();
500  m_abstract_families.clear();
501  m_abstract_family_to_kind_map.clear();
502 }
503 
504 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
505 
506 void
507 BasicIndexManager::
508 setTraceMng(ITraceMng * traceMng)
509 {
510  m_trace = traceMng;
511 }
512 
513 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
514 
515 IIndexManager::Entry
516 BasicIndexManager::
517 buildEntry(const String name, const IAbstractFamily * family, const Integer kind)
518 {
519  if (m_state != Initialized)
520  throw FatalErrorException(A_FUNCINFO,"Inconsistent state");
521 
522  // Recherche de l'entr���e d'un nom
523  std::pair<EntrySet::iterator,bool> lookup
524  = m_entry_set.insert(EntrySet::value_type(name,(MyEntryImpl *)NULL));
525  if (lookup.second)
526  {
527  MyEntryImpl * entry = new MyEntryImpl(name,family, m_creation_index++, this, kind);
528  lookup.first->second = entry;
529  return entry;
530  }
531  else
532  {
533  throw FatalErrorException(A_FUNCINFO,"Already defined entry");
534  return NULL;
535  }
536 }
537 
538 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
539 
540 IIndexManager::Entry
541 BasicIndexManager::
542 getEntry(const String name) const
543 {
544  EntrySet::const_iterator lookup = m_entry_set.find(name);
545  if (lookup != m_entry_set.end())
546  {
547  return lookup->second;
548  }
549  else
550  {
551  throw FatalErrorException(A_FUNCINFO,"Undefined entry requested");
552  return NULL;
553  }
554 }
555 
556 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
557 
558 void
559 BasicIndexManager::
560 defineIndex(const Entry & entry, const IntegerConstArrayView localIds)
561 {
562  if (m_state != Initialized)
563  throw FatalErrorException(A_FUNCINFO,"Inconsistent state");
564 
565  ARCANE_ASSERT((entry.manager() == this),("Incompatible entry from another manager"));
566  MyEntryImpl * myEntry = static_cast<MyEntryImpl*>(entry.internal());
567 
568  const IAbstractFamily & family = myEntry->getFamily();
569  auto owners = family.owners(localIds);
570  myEntry->reserveLid(localIds.size());
571  for(Integer i=0,is=localIds.size();i<is; ++i)
572  {
573  const Integer localId = localIds[i];
574 
575  if (not myEntry->isDefinedLid(localId)) { // nouvelle entr���e
576  if (owners[i] == m_local_owner)
577  {
578  myEntry->defineLid(localId, +(m_local_removed_entry_count+m_local_entry_count++));
579  }
580  else
581  {
582  myEntry->defineLid(localId, -(m_global_removed_entry_count+(++m_global_entry_count)));
583  }
584  }
585  }
586 }
587 
588 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
589 
590 void
591 BasicIndexManager::
592 removeIndex(const ScalarIndexSet & entry, const Arcane::ItemGroup & itemGroup)
593 {
594  if (m_state != Initialized)
595  throw FatalErrorException(A_FUNCINFO,"Inconsistent state");
596 
597  ARCANE_ASSERT((entry.manager() == this),("Incompatible entry from another manager"));
598  MyEntryImpl * myEntry = static_cast<MyEntryImpl*>(entry.internal());
599 
600  ARCANE_ASSERT((itemGroup.itemKind() == myEntry->getKind()),("Bad kind item"));
601  ENUMERATE_ITEM(i,itemGroup)
602  {
603  const Item & item = *i;
604  const Integer localId = item.localId();
605  if (myEntry->isDefinedLid(localId)) {
606  myEntry->undefineLid(localId);
607  if (item.isOwn())
608  {
609  --m_local_entry_count ;
610  ++m_local_removed_entry_count ;
611  }
612  else
613  {
614  --m_global_entry_count ;
615  ++m_global_removed_entry_count ;
616  }
617  }
618  }
619 }
620 
621 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
622 
623 void
624 BasicIndexManager::
625 prepare()
626 {
627  if (m_state != Initialized)
628  throw FatalErrorException(A_FUNCINFO,"Inconsistent state");
629 
630  Integer total_size = 0;
631  for(EntrySet::iterator i = m_entry_set.begin(); i != m_entry_set.end(); ++i)
632  {
633  MyEntryImpl * entry = i->second;
634  total_size += entry->definedLids().size();
635  }
636 
637  EntryIndexMap entry_index;
638  entry_index.reserve(total_size);
639 
640  for(EntrySet::iterator i = m_entry_set.begin(); i != m_entry_set.end(); ++i)
641  {
642  MyEntryImpl * entry = i->second;
643 
644  const Integer creation_index = entry->getCreationIndex();
645  const IAbstractFamily & family = entry->getFamily();
646  const Integer entry_kind = entry->getKind();
647 #ifdef SPLIT_CONTAINER
648  const Array<Integer> & lids = entry->definedLids();
649  const Array<Integer> & indexes = entry->definedIndexes();
650  SafeConstArrayView<Integer> owners = family.owners(lids);
651  SafeConstArrayView<Int64> uids = family.uids(lids);
652 #else /* SPLIT_CONTAINER */
653  const Array<std::pair<Integer, Integer> > & lids = entry->definedLids();
654 #endif /* SPLIT_CONTAINER */
655 
656  for(Integer i=0, is=lids.size();i<is;++i)
657  {
658 #ifdef SPLIT_CONTAINER
659  const Integer item_lid = lids[i];
660  const Integer item_index = indexes[i];
661  const Integer item_owner = owners[i];
662  const Int64 item_uid = uids[i];
663  entry_index.push_back(InternalEntryIndex(entry, item_lid, entry_kind, item_uid, item_index, creation_index, item_owner));
664 #else /* SPLIT_CONTAINER */
665  const Integer localid = lids[i].first;
666  IAbstractFamily::Item item = family.item(localid);
667  entry_index.push_back(InternalEntryIndex(entry, localid, entry_kind, item.uniqueId(), lids[i].second, creation_index, item.owner()));
668 #endif /* SPLIT_CONTAINER */
669  }
670  entry->freeDefinedLids();
671  }
672 
673  std::sort(entry_index.begin(), entry_index.end(), EntryIndexComparator());
674 
675  ARCANE_ASSERT(((Integer)entry_index.size() == m_local_entry_count + m_global_entry_count),("Inconsistent global size"));
676 
677  if (m_parallel_mng->isParallel() and m_parallel_mng->commSize() > 1)
678  parallel_prepare(entry_index);
679  else
680  sequential_prepare(entry_index);
681 
682  // Finalize : fige les donn���es dans les entries
683  for(EntrySet::iterator i=m_entry_set.begin(); i != m_entry_set.end(); ++i)
684  {
685  i->second->finalize(entry_index);
686  }
687 
688  if (m_trace) {
689  m_trace->info() << "Entry ordering :";
690  for(EntrySet::iterator i=m_entry_set.begin(); i != m_entry_set.end(); ++i)
691  {
692  m_trace->info() << "\tEntry '" << i->first << "' placed at rank " << i->second->getCreationIndex() << " with " << i->second->getOwnLocalIds().size() << " local / " << i->second->getAllLocalIds().size() << " global indexes ";
693  }
694  m_trace->info() << "Total local Entry indexes = " << m_local_entry_count;
695  }
696 
697  m_state = Prepared;
698 }
699 
700 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
701 
702 void
703 BasicIndexManager::
704 parallel_prepare(EntryIndexMap & entry_index)
705 {
706  ARCANE_ASSERT((m_parallel_mng->isParallel()),("Parallel mode expected"));
707 
708  /* Algorithme:
709  * 1 - listing des couples Entry-Item non locaux
710  * 2 - Envoi vers les propri���taires des items non locaux
711  * 3 - Prise en compte ���ventuelle de nouvelles entr���es
712  * 4 - Nommage locales
713  * 5 - Retour vers demandeurs des EntryIndex non locaux
714  * 6 - Finalisation de la num���rotation (table reindex)
715  */
716 
717  // Infos utiles
718  ISerializeMessageList * messageList;
719 
720  // Structure pour accumuler et structurer la collecte de l'information
721  typedef std::map<EntryImpl*,EntrySendRequest> SendRequestByEntry;
722  typedef std::map<Integer, SendRequestByEntry> SendRequests;
723  SendRequests sendRequests;
724 
725  // 1 - Comptage des Items non locaux
726  for(EntryIndexMap::const_iterator i = entry_index.begin(); i != entry_index.end(); ++i)
727  {
728  const InternalEntryIndex & entryIndex = *i;
729  MyEntryImpl * entryImpl = entryIndex.m_entry;
730  const Integer item_owner = entryIndex.m_owner;
731  if (item_owner != m_local_owner)
732  {
733  // if (m_trace) m_trace->pinfo() << item.localId() << " : " << item.uniqueId() << " is owned by " << item.owner() << " with localIndex=" << i->second;
734  sendRequests[item_owner][entryImpl].count++;
735  }
736  else
737  {
738  // if (m_trace) m_trace->pinfo() << item.localId() << " : " << item.uniqueId() << " is local with localIndex=" << i->second;
739  }
740  }
741 
742  // Liste de synth���se des messages (emissions / r���ceptions)
743  messageList = m_parallel_mng->createSerializeMessageList();
744 
745  // Contruction de la table de communications + pr���paration des messages d'envoi
746  SharedArray<Integer> sendToDomains(2*m_parallel_mng->commSize(),0);
747 
748  for(SendRequests::iterator i = sendRequests.begin(); i != sendRequests.end(); ++i)
749  {
750  const Integer destDomainId = i->first;
751  SendRequestByEntry & requests = i->second;
752  for(SendRequestByEntry::iterator j = requests.begin(); j != requests.end(); ++j)
753  {
754  EntrySendRequest & request = j->second;
755  EntryImpl * entryImpl = j->first;
756  const String nameString = entryImpl->getName();
757 
758  // if (m_trace) m_trace->pinfo() << "Entry [" << nameString << "] to " << destDomainId << " : " << request.count;
759 
760  // Donn���es pour receveur
761  sendToDomains[2*destDomainId + 0] += 1;
762  sendToDomains[2*destDomainId + 1] += request.count;
763 
764  // Construction du message du EntrySendRequest
765  request.comm = new SerializeMessage(m_parallel_mng->commRank(),destDomainId,ISerializeMessage::MT_Send);
766 
767  messageList->addMessage(request.comm);
768  SerializeBuffer & sbuf = request.comm->buffer();
769  sbuf.setMode(ISerializer::ModeReserve); // phase pr���paratoire
770  sbuf.reserve(nameString); // Chaine de caract���re du nom de l'entr���e
771  sbuf.reserveInteger(1); // Nb d'item
772  sbuf.reserve(DT_Int64,request.count); // Les uid
773  sbuf.allocateBuffer(); // allocation m���moire
774  sbuf.setMode(ISerializer::ModePut);
775  sbuf.put(nameString);
776  sbuf.put(request.count);
777  }
778  }
779 
780  // 2 - Accumulation des valeurs ��� demander
781  for(EntryIndexMap::const_iterator i = entry_index.begin(); i != entry_index.end(); ++i)
782  {
783  const InternalEntryIndex & entryIndex = *i;
784  MyEntryImpl * entryImpl = entryIndex.m_entry;
785  const Integer item_owner = entryIndex.m_owner;
786  const Int64 item_uid = entryIndex.m_uid;
787  if (item_owner != m_local_owner)
788  sendRequests[item_owner][entryImpl].comm->buffer().put(item_uid);
789  }
790 
791  // R���ception des annonces de demandes (les nombres d'entr���e + taille)
792  UniqueArray<Integer> recvFromDomains(2*m_parallel_mng->commSize());
793  m_parallel_mng->allToAll(sendToDomains,recvFromDomains,2);
794 
795  // Table des requetes exterieures (re���oit les uid et renverra les EntryIndex finaux)
796  typedef std::list<EntryRecvRequest> RecvRequests;
797  RecvRequests recvRequests;
798 
799  for(Integer isd=0, nsd=m_parallel_mng->commSize();isd<nsd;++isd)
800  {
801  Integer recvCount = recvFromDomains[2*isd+0];
802  while ( recvCount-- > 0 )
803  {
804  // if (m_trace) m_trace->pinfo() << "will receive an entry with " << recvFromDomains[2*isd+1] << " uid from " << isd;
805  SerializeMessage * recvMsg = new SerializeMessage(m_parallel_mng->commRank(),isd,ISerializeMessage::MT_Recv);
806  recvRequests.push_back(EntryRecvRequest());
807  EntryRecvRequest & recvRequest = recvRequests.back();
808  recvRequest.comm = recvMsg;
809  messageList->addMessage(recvMsg);
810  }
811  }
812 
813  // Traitement des communications
814  messageList->processPendingMessages();
815  messageList->waitMessages(Arcane::Parallel::WaitAll);
816  delete messageList; messageList = NULL; // Destruction propre
817 
818 
819  // Pour les r���ponses vers les demandeurs
820  messageList = m_parallel_mng->createSerializeMessageList();
821 
822  // 3 - R���ception et mise en base local des demandes
823  for(RecvRequests::iterator i = recvRequests.begin(); i != recvRequests.end(); ++i)
824  {
825  EntryRecvRequest & recvRequest = *i;
826  String nameString;
827  Integer uidCount;
828 
829  { // Traitement des arriv���es
830  SerializeBuffer& sbuf = recvRequest.comm->buffer();
831  sbuf.setMode(ISerializer::ModeGet);
832 
833  sbuf.get(nameString);
834  uidCount = sbuf.getInteger();
835  // if (m_trace) m_trace->pinfo() << nameString << " received with " << uidCount << " ids";
836  recvRequest.ids.resize(uidCount);
837  sbuf.get(recvRequest.ids);
838  ARCANE_ASSERT((uidCount == recvRequest.ids.size()),("Inconsistency detected"));
839 
840 //#ifndef NO_USER_WARNING
841 //#ifndef WIN32
842 //#warning "CHECK: optimisable ?"
843 //#endif
844 //#endif
845  /* Si on est s���r que les entr���es et l'item demand���es doivent
846  * toujours exister (m���me les pires cas), on peut faire
847  * l'indexation locale avant et envoyer imm���diatement (via un
848  * buffer; dans la pr���sente boucle) la r���ponse.
849  */
850 
851  // Reconstruction de l'entr���e ��� partir du nom
852  EntrySet::iterator lookup = m_entry_set.find(nameString);
853  // Si pas d'entr���e de ce c���t��� => syst���me d���fectueux ?
854  if (lookup == m_entry_set.end())
855  throw FatalErrorException("Non local Entry Requested : degenerated system ?");
856 
857  MyEntryImpl * currentEntry = lookup->second;
858  const Integer current_creation_index = currentEntry->getCreationIndex();
859 
860  // Passage de l'uid ��� l'item associ��� (travaille sur place : pas de recopie)
861  Int64ArrayView ids = recvRequest.ids;
862 
863  const IAbstractFamily & family = currentEntry->getFamily();
864  const Integer entry_kind = currentEntry->getKind();
865  Int32SharedArray lids(ids.size());
866  family.uniqueIdToLocalId(lids, ids);
867  // V���rification d'int���grit��� : toutes les entr���es demand���es sont d���finies localement
868  auto owners = family.owners(lids);
869  for(Integer j=0; j < uidCount; ++j)
870  {
871  const Integer current_item_lid = lids[j];
872  const Int64 current_item_uid = ids[j];
873  const Integer current_item_owner = owners[j];
874  if (current_item_owner != m_local_owner)
875  throw FatalErrorException("Non local EntryIndex requested");
876 
877  InternalEntryIndex lookup_entry(currentEntry, current_item_lid, entry_kind,current_item_uid,0, current_creation_index, current_item_owner);
878 
879  EntryIndexMap::const_iterator lookup = std::lower_bound(entry_index.begin(), entry_index.end(),
880  lookup_entry,
881  EntryIndexComparator());
882 
883  if ((lookup == entry_index.end()) || !(*lookup == lookup_entry))
884  throw FatalErrorException("Not locally defined entry requested");
885 
886  // Mise en place de la pre-valeur retour [avant renum���rotation locale] (EntryIndex ���crit sur un Int64)
887  ids[j] = lookup->m_index;
888  }
889  }
890 
891  { // Pr���paration des retours
892  #ifndef USE_ARCANE_V3
893  Integer dest = recvRequest.comm->destSubDomain(); // Attention ��� l'ordre bizarre
894  Integer orig = recvRequest.comm->origSubDomain(); // de SerializeMessage
895  #else
896  Integer dest = recvRequest.comm->destination().value(); // Attention ��� l'ordre bizarre
897  Integer orig = recvRequest.comm->source().value(); // de SerializeMessage
898  #endif
899  delete recvRequest.comm;
900  recvRequest.comm = new SerializeMessage(orig,dest,ISerializeMessage::MT_Send);
901  messageList->addMessage(recvRequest.comm);
902 
903  SerializeBuffer & sbuf = recvRequest.comm->buffer();
904  sbuf.setMode(ISerializer::ModeReserve); // phase pr���paratoire
905  sbuf.reserve(nameString); // Chaine de caract���re du nom de l'entr���e
906  sbuf.reserveInteger(1); // Nb d'item
907  sbuf.reserveInteger(uidCount); // Les index
908  sbuf.allocateBuffer(); // allocation m���moire
909  sbuf.setMode(ISerializer::ModePut);
910  sbuf.put(nameString);
911  sbuf.put(uidCount);
912  }
913  }
914 
915  // 4 - Indexation locale
916  /* La politique naive ici appliqu���e est de num���roter tous les
917  * (Entry,Item) locaux d'abord.
918  */
919  // Calcul de des offsets globaux sur Entry (via les tailles locales)
920  UniqueArray<Integer> allLocalSizes(m_parallel_mng->commSize());
921  UniqueArray<Integer> myLocalSize(1);
922  myLocalSize[0] = m_local_entry_count;
923  m_parallel_mng->allGather(myLocalSize,allLocalSizes);
924 
925  // Table de r���-indexation (EntryIndex->Integer)
926  Arcane::IntegerSharedArray entry_reindex(m_local_entry_count+m_local_removed_entry_count);
927  entry_reindex.fill(-1); // valeur de type Erreur par d���faut
928 
929  // Calcul de la taille des indices par entr���e
930  reserveEntries(entry_index);
931 
932  // Mise ��� jour du contenu des entr���es
933  m_global_entry_offset = 0;
934  for(Integer i=0; i<m_parallel_mng->commRank(); ++i)
935  {
936  m_global_entry_offset += allLocalSizes[i];
937  }
938  // Utiliser MPI_Scan ? (equivalent Arcane)
939 
940  // C'est ici et uniquement ici qu'est mat���rialis��� l'ordre des entr���es
941  Integer currentEntryIndex = m_global_entry_offset; // commence par l'offset local
942  for(EntryIndexMap::iterator i = entry_index.begin(); i != entry_index.end(); ++i)
943  {
944  const InternalEntryIndex & entryIndex = *i;
945  ARCANE_ASSERT((entryIndex.m_entry != NULL),("Unexpected null entry"));
946  const Integer item_owner = entryIndex.m_owner;
947  if (item_owner == m_local_owner)
948  { // Num���rotation locale !
949  const Integer newIndex = currentEntryIndex++;
950 
951  ARCANE_ASSERT(((i->m_index >= 0)&&(i->m_index<m_local_entry_count+m_local_removed_entry_count)),
952  ("Unexpected non local entry with negative index"));
953  entry_reindex[i->m_index] = newIndex; // Table de translation
954  i->m_index = newIndex;
955  }
956  }
957 
958  // 5 - Envoie des retours (EntryIndex globaux)
959  for(RecvRequests::iterator i = recvRequests.begin(); i != recvRequests.end(); ++i)
960  {
961  EntryRecvRequest & recvRequest = *i;
962  SerializeBuffer& sbuf = recvRequest.comm->buffer();
963  Int64Array & ids = recvRequest.ids;
964  for(Integer j = 0; j<ids.size(); ++j)
965  {
966  sbuf.putInteger(entry_reindex[ids[j]]); // Via la table de r���indexation
967  }
968  }
969 
970  // Table des buffers de retour
971  typedef std::list<SerializeMessage *> ReturnedRequests;
972  ReturnedRequests returnedRequests;
973 
974  // Acces rapide aux buffers connaissant le proc emetteur et le nom d'une entr���e
975  /* Car on ne peut tager les buffers donc l'entr���e re���ue dans un buffer est non d���termin���e
976  * surtout si 2 domaines se communiquent plus d'une entr���e
977  */
978  typedef std::map<Integer, EntrySendRequest*> SubFastReturnMap;
979  typedef std::map<String, SubFastReturnMap> FastReturnMap;
980  FastReturnMap fastReturnMap;
981 
982  // Pr���paration des r���ceptions [sens inverse]
983  for(SendRequests::iterator i = sendRequests.begin(); i != sendRequests.end(); ++i)
984  {
985  const Integer destDomainId = i->first;
986  SendRequestByEntry & requests = i->second;
987  for(SendRequestByEntry::iterator j = requests.begin(); j != requests.end(); ++j)
988  {
989  EntrySendRequest & request = j->second;
990  EntryImpl * entryImpl = j->first;
991  const String nameString = entryImpl->getName();
992 
993  // On ne peut pas associer directement le message ��� cette entr���e
994  // : dans le cas d'���change multiple il n'y pas de garantie d'arriv���e
995  // ��� la bonne place
996  delete request.comm; request.comm = NULL;
997 
998  SerializeMessage * msg = new SerializeMessage(m_parallel_mng->commRank(),destDomainId,ISerializeMessage::MT_Recv);
999  returnedRequests.push_back(msg);
1000  messageList->addMessage(msg);
1001 
1002  fastReturnMap[nameString][destDomainId] = &request;
1003  }
1004  }
1005 
1006  // Traitement des communications
1007  messageList->processPendingMessages();
1008  messageList->waitMessages(Parallel::WaitAll);
1009  delete messageList; messageList = NULL; // Destruction propre de l'ancienne liste
1010 
1011  // 6 - Traitement des r���ponses
1012  // Association aux EntrySendRequest du buffer correspondant
1013  for(ReturnedRequests::iterator i = returnedRequests.begin(); i != returnedRequests.end(); ++i)
1014  {
1015  SerializeMessage * message = *i;
1016  #ifndef USE_ARCANE_V3
1017  const Integer origDomainId = message->destSubDomain();
1018  #else
1019  const Integer origDomainId = message->destination().value();
1020  #endif
1021  SerializeBuffer& sbuf = message->buffer();
1022  sbuf.setMode(ISerializer::ModeGet);
1023  String nameString;
1024  sbuf.get(nameString);
1025  ARCANE_ASSERT((fastReturnMap[nameString][origDomainId] != NULL),("Inconsistency detected"));
1026  EntrySendRequest & request = *fastReturnMap[nameString][origDomainId];
1027  request.comm = *i; // Reconnection pour acc���s rapide depuis l'EntrySendRequest
1028 #ifdef ARCANE_DEBUG_ASSERT
1029  const Integer idCount = sbuf.getInteger();
1030 #else
1031  sbuf.getInteger();
1032 #endif
1033  ARCANE_ASSERT((request.count == idCount),("Inconsistency detected"));
1034  }
1035 
1036  // Distribution des reponses
1037  // Par parcours dans ordre initial (celui de la demande)
1038  for(EntryIndexMap::iterator i = entry_index.begin(); i != entry_index.end(); ++i)
1039  {
1040  const InternalEntryIndex & entryIndex = *i;
1041  const Integer item_owner = entryIndex.m_owner;
1042  if (item_owner != m_local_owner)
1043  {
1044  EntryImpl * entryImpl = entryIndex.m_entry;
1045  EntrySendRequest & request = sendRequests[item_owner][entryImpl];
1046  ARCANE_ASSERT((request.count > 0),("Unexpected empty request"));
1047  --request.count;
1048  SerializeBuffer& sbuf = request.comm->buffer();
1049  const Integer newIndex = sbuf.getInteger();
1050  i->m_index = newIndex;
1051  }
1052  }
1053 
1054  // Calcul de la taille global d'indexation (donc du syst���me associ���)
1055  m_global_entry_count = 0;
1056  for(Integer i=0; i<m_parallel_mng->commSize(); ++i)
1057  {
1058  m_global_entry_count += allLocalSizes[i];
1059  }
1060 }
1061 
1062 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
1063 
1064 void
1065 BasicIndexManager::
1066 sequential_prepare(EntryIndexMap & entry_index)
1067 {
1068  ARCANE_ASSERT((not m_parallel_mng->isParallel() || m_parallel_mng->commSize() <= 1),("Sequential mode expected"));
1069  ARCANE_ASSERT((m_global_entry_count == 0),("Unexpected global entries (%d)",m_global_entry_count));
1070 
1071  // Tr���s similaire ��� la section parall���le :
1072  // 4 - Indexation locale
1073  /* La politique naive ici appliqu���e est de num���roter tous les
1074  * (Entry,Item) locaux d'abord.
1075  */
1076 
1077  // Calcul de la taille des indices par entr���e
1078  reserveEntries(entry_index);
1079 
1080  // Mise ��� jour du contenu des entr���es
1081  // Pas d'offset car s���quentiel
1082  m_global_entry_offset = 0;
1083 
1084  // C'est ici et uniquement ici qu'est mat���rialis��� l'ordre des entr���es
1085  Integer currentEntryIndex = m_global_entry_offset; // commence par l'offset local
1086  for(EntryIndexMap::iterator i = entry_index.begin(); i != entry_index.end(); ++i)
1087  {
1088  ARCANE_ASSERT((i->m_entry != NULL),("Unexpected null entry"));
1089  ARCANE_ASSERT((i->m_owner == m_local_owner),("Item cannot be non-local for sequential mode"));
1090  // Num���rotation locale only !
1091  const Integer newIndex = currentEntryIndex++;
1092  i->m_index = newIndex;
1093  }
1094 
1095  m_global_entry_count = m_local_entry_count;
1096 }
1097 
1098 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
1099 
1100 void
1101 BasicIndexManager::
1102 reserveEntries(const EntryIndexMap & entry_index)
1103 {
1104  // Calcul de la taille des indices par entr���e
1105  std::map<const EntryImpl *,Integer> count_table;
1106  for(EntryIndexMap::const_iterator i = entry_index.begin(); i != entry_index.end(); ++i)
1107  {
1108  const EntryImpl * entryImpl = i->m_entry;
1109  count_table[entryImpl]++;
1110  }
1111 
1112  // Dimensionnement des buffers de chaque entr���e
1113  for(EntrySet::iterator i = m_entry_set.begin(); i != m_entry_set.end(); ++i)
1114  {
1115  MyEntryImpl * entry = i->second;
1116  entry->reserve(count_table[entry]);
1117  // if (m_trace) m_trace->pinfo() << "Entry " << entry->getName() << " size = " << count_table[entry];
1118  }
1119 
1120  // // Calcul de la taille des indices par entr���e
1121  // IntegerArray count_table(m_creation_index, 0);
1122  // for(EntryIndexMap::const_iterator i = entry_index.begin(); i != entry_index.end(); ++i)
1123  // {
1124  // count_table[i->m_entry->getCreationIndex()]++;
1125  // }
1126 
1127  // // Dimensionnement des buffers de chaque entr���e
1128  // for(EntrySet::iterator i = m_entry_set.begin(); i != m_entry_set.end(); ++i)
1129  // {
1130  // MyEntryImpl * entry = i->second;
1131  // entry->reserve(count_table[entry->getCreationIndex()]);
1132  // // if (m_trace) m_trace->pinfo() << "Entry " << entry->getName() << " size = " << count_table[entry];
1133  // }
1134 }
1135 
1136 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
1137 
1138 Integer
1139 BasicIndexManager::
1140 getIndex(const Entry & entry, const Item & item) const
1141 {
1142  if (m_state != Prepared)
1143  throw FatalErrorException(A_FUNCINFO,"Inconsistent state");
1144 
1145  ARCANE_ASSERT((entry.manager() == this),("Incompatible entry from another manager"));
1146  MyEntryImpl * myEntry = static_cast<MyEntryImpl*>(entry.internal());
1147  ConstArrayView<Integer> localIds = myEntry->getAllLocalIds();
1148  ConstArrayView<Integer> indices = myEntry->getAllIndexes();
1149 
1150  const Integer itemLocalId = item.localId();
1151  Integer i = 0;
1152  while(i<localIds.size() && localIds[i] != itemLocalId) ++i;
1153  if (i == localIds.size()) throw FatalErrorException(A_FUNCINFO,"Cannot get undefined entry index");
1154  return indices[i];
1155 }
1156 
1157 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
1158 
1159 void
1160 BasicIndexManager::
1161 getIndex(const ScalarIndexSet & entry, const Arcane::ItemVectorView & items, ArrayView<Integer> indexes) const
1162 {
1163  if (m_state != Prepared)
1164  throw FatalErrorException(A_FUNCINFO,"Inconsistent state");
1165  if (items.size() != indexes.size())
1166  throw FatalErrorException(A_FUNCINFO,"Inconsistent sizes");
1167 
1168  ARCANE_ASSERT((entry.manager() == this),("Incompatible entry from another manager"));
1169  MyEntryImpl * myEntry = static_cast<MyEntryImpl*>(entry.internal());
1170 
1171  ConstArrayView<Integer> localIds = myEntry->getAllLocalIds();
1172  ConstArrayView<Integer> indices = myEntry->getAllIndexes();
1173 
1174  ENUMERATE_ITEM(iitem,items) {
1175  const Integer itemLocalId = iitem.localId();
1176  Integer i = 0;
1177  while(i<localIds.size() && localIds[i] != itemLocalId) ++i;
1178  if (i == localIds.size()) throw FatalErrorException(A_FUNCINFO,"Cannot get undefined entry index");
1179  indexes[iitem.index()] = indices[i];
1180  }
1181 }
1182 
1183 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
1184 
1185 Arcane::IntegerSharedArray
1186 BasicIndexManager::
1187 getIndexes(const Entry & entry) const
1188 {
1189  if (m_state != Prepared)
1190  throw FatalErrorException(A_FUNCINFO,"Inconsistent state");
1191 
1192  ARCANE_ASSERT((entry.manager() == this),("Incompatible entry from another manager"));
1193  MyEntryImpl * en = static_cast<MyEntryImpl*>(entry.internal());
1194  ARCANE_ASSERT((en != NULL),("Unexpected null entry"));
1195  const IAbstractFamily & family = en->getFamily();
1196  Arcane::IntegerSharedArray allIds(family.maxLocalId(),nullIndex());
1197  const IntegerConstArrayView allIndices = en->getAllIndexes();
1198  const IntegerConstArrayView allLocalIds = en->getAllLocalIds();
1199  const Integer size = allIndices.size();
1200  for(Integer i=0;i<size;++i)
1201  allIds[allLocalIds[i]] = allIndices[i];
1202  return allIds;
1203 }
1204 
1205 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
1206 
1207 Arcane::SharedArray2<Integer>
1208 BasicIndexManager::
1209 getIndexes(const VectorIndexSet & entries) const
1210 {
1211  if (m_state != Prepared)
1212  throw FatalErrorException(A_FUNCINFO,"Inconsistent state");
1213 
1214  Integer max_family_size = 0;
1215  for(Integer entry=0;entry<entries.size();++entry)
1216  {
1217  // controles uniquement en premi���re passe
1218  ARCANE_ASSERT((entries[entry].manager() == this),("Incompatible entry from another manager"));
1219  MyEntryImpl * en = static_cast<MyEntryImpl*>(entries[entry].internal());
1220  ARCANE_ASSERT((en != NULL),("Unexpected null entry"));
1221  const IAbstractFamily & family = en->getFamily();
1222  max_family_size = math::max(max_family_size,family.maxLocalId());
1223  }
1224 
1225  Arcane::SharedArray2<Integer> allIds(max_family_size,entries.size());
1226  allIds.fill(nullIndex());
1227 
1228  for(Integer entry=0;entry<entries.size();++entry)
1229  {
1230  MyEntryImpl * en = static_cast<MyEntryImpl*>(entries[entry].internal());
1231  const IntegerConstArrayView allIndices = en->getAllIndexes();
1232  const IntegerConstArrayView allLocalIds = en->getAllLocalIds();
1233  const Integer size = allIndices.size();
1234  for(Integer i=0;i<size;++i)
1235  allIds[allLocalIds[i]][entry] = allIndices[i];
1236  }
1237  return allIds;
1238 }
1239 
1240 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
1241 
1242 void
1243 BasicIndexManager::
1244 stats(Integer & globalSize,
1245  Integer & minLocalIndex,
1246  Integer & localSize) const
1247 {
1248  if (m_state != Prepared)
1249  throw FatalErrorException(A_FUNCINFO,"Inconsistent state");
1250 
1251  globalSize = m_global_entry_count;
1252  minLocalIndex = m_global_entry_offset;
1253  localSize = m_local_entry_count;
1254 }
1255 
1256 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
1257 
1258 Integer
1259 BasicIndexManager::
1260 globalSize() const
1261 {
1262  if (m_state != Prepared)
1263  throw FatalErrorException(A_FUNCINFO,"Inconsistent state");
1264 
1265  return m_global_entry_count;
1266 }
1267 
1268 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
1269 
1270 Integer
1271 BasicIndexManager::
1272 minLocalIndex() const
1273 {
1274  if (m_state != Prepared)
1275  throw FatalErrorException(A_FUNCINFO,"Inconsistent state");
1276 
1277  return m_global_entry_offset;
1278 }
1279 
1280 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
1281 
1282 Integer
1283 BasicIndexManager::
1284 localSize() const
1285 {
1286  if (m_state != Prepared)
1287  throw FatalErrorException(A_FUNCINFO,"Inconsistent state");
1288 
1289  return m_local_entry_count;
1290 }
1291

1294 IIndexManager::EntryEnumerator
1295 BasicIndexManager::
1296 enumerateEntry() const
1297 {
1298  return EntryEnumerator(new MyEntryEnumeratorImpl(m_entry_set));
1299 }

1301 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
1302 
1303 bool
1304 BasicIndexManager::EntryIndexComparator::
1305 operator()(const BasicIndexManager::InternalEntryIndex & a,
1306  const BasicIndexManager::InternalEntryIndex & b) const
1307 {
1308  const MyEntryImpl * aEntry = a.m_entry;
1309  const MyEntryImpl * bEntry = b.m_entry;
1310  if (a.m_kind != b.m_kind)
1311  return a.m_kind < b.m_kind;
1312  else if (a.m_uid != b.m_uid)
1313  return a.m_uid < b.m_uid;
1314  else
1315  return aEntry->getCreationIndex() < bEntry->getCreationIndex();
1316  // return a.m_creation_index < b.m_creation_index;
1317 }
1318 
1319 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
1320 
1321 IIndexManager::ScalarIndexSet
1322 BasicIndexManager::
1323 buildScalarIndexSet(const String name, Arcane::IItemFamily * item_family)
1324 {
1325  Integer kind = kindFromItemFamily(item_family);
1326  boost::shared_ptr<IAbstractFamily> & family = m_abstract_families[kind];
1327  if (!family) family.reset(new ItemAbstractFamily(item_family));
1328  ItemAbstractFamily* f = dynamic_cast<ItemAbstractFamily*>(family.get());
1329  if(f == NULL) {
1330  m_trace->fatal() << "Error, family is not a ItemAbstractFamily";
1331  }
1332  if(f->family() != item_family) {
1333  m_trace->fatal() << "Error, family are not the same...";
1334  }
1335  Entry en = buildEntry(name, family.get(), kind);
1336  return en;
1337 }
1338 
1339 void
1340 BasicIndexManager::
1341 defineIndex(IIndexManager::ScalarIndexSet& entry, const Arcane::ItemGroup & itemGroup)
1342 {
1343  defineIndex(entry,itemGroup.view().localIds());
1344 }
1345 
1346 IIndexManager::ScalarIndexSet
1347 BasicIndexManager::
1348 buildScalarIndexSet(const String name, const Arcane::ItemGroup & itemGroup)
1349 {
1350  Entry en = buildScalarIndexSet(name, itemGroup.itemFamily());
1351  defineIndex(en,itemGroup.view().localIds());
1352  return en;
1353 }
1354 
1355 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
1356 
1357 IIndexManager::ScalarIndexSet
1358 BasicIndexManager::
1359 buildScalarIndexSet(const String name, const IntegerConstArrayView localIds, const IAbstractFamily & family)
1360 {
1361  Entry en = buildEntry(name, &family, addNewAbstractFamily(&family));
1362  defineIndex(en,localIds);
1363  return en;
1364 }
1365 
1366 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
1367 
1368 IIndexManager::ScalarIndexSet
1369 BasicIndexManager::
1370 buildScalarIndexSet(const String name, const IAbstractFamily & family)
1371 {
1372  auto localIds = family.allLocalIds();
1373  Entry en = buildEntry(name, &family, addNewAbstractFamily(&family));
1374  defineIndex(en,localIds.view());
1375  return en;
1376 }
1377 
1378 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
1379 
1380 IIndexManager::VectorIndexSet
1381 BasicIndexManager::
1382 buildVectorIndexSet(const String name, const Arcane::ItemGroup & itemGroup, const Integer n)
1383 {
1384  VectorIndexSet ens(n);
1385  const IntegerConstArrayView localIds = itemGroup.view().localIds();
1386  Arcane::IItemFamily * item_family = itemGroup.itemFamily();
1387  Integer kind = kindFromItemFamily(item_family);
1388  boost::shared_ptr<IAbstractFamily> & family = m_abstract_families[kind];
1389  if (!family) family.reset(new ItemAbstractFamily(item_family));
1390  ItemAbstractFamily* f = dynamic_cast<ItemAbstractFamily*>(family.get());
1391  if(f == NULL) {
1392  m_trace->fatal() << "Error, family is not a ItemAbstractFamily";
1393  }
1394  if(f->family() != item_family) {
1395  m_trace->fatal() << "Error, family are not the same...";
1396  }
1397  for(Integer i=0;i<n;++i)
1398  {
1399  ens[i] = buildEntry(String::format("{0}[{1}]",name,i),family.get(),kind);
1400  defineIndex(ens[i],localIds);
1401  }
1402  return ens;
1403 }
1404 
1405 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
1406 
1407 IIndexManager::VectorIndexSet
1408 BasicIndexManager::
1409 buildVectorIndexSet(const String name, const IntegerConstArrayView localIds, const IAbstractFamily & family, const Integer n)
1410 {
1411  VectorIndexSet ens(n);
1412  for(Integer i=0;i<n;++i)
1413  {
1414  ens[i] = buildEntry(String::format("{0}[{1}]",name,i),&family,addNewAbstractFamily(&family));
1415  defineIndex(ens[i],localIds);
1416  }
1417  return ens;
1418 }
1419 
1420 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
1421 
1422 IIndexManager::VectorIndexSet
1423 BasicIndexManager::
1424 buildVectorIndexSet(const String name, const IAbstractFamily & family, const Integer n)
1425 {
1426  auto localIds = family.allLocalIds();
1427 
1428  VectorIndexSet ens(n);
1429  for(Integer i=0;i<n;++i)
1430  {
1431  ens[i] = buildEntry(String::format("{0}[{1}]",name,i),&family,addNewAbstractFamily(&family));
1432  defineIndex(ens[i],localIds.view());
1433  }
1434  return ens;
1435 }
1436 
1437 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
1438 
1439 void
1440 BasicIndexManager::
1441 keepAlive(const IAbstractFamily * family)
1442 {
1443  std::map<const IAbstractFamily *, Integer>::iterator finder = m_abstract_family_to_kind_map.find(family);
1444  if (finder == m_abstract_family_to_kind_map.end())
1445  return; // pas connu => on ne fait rien
1446  if (m_abstract_families[finder->second])
1447  throw FatalErrorException(A_FUNCINFO, "Already known as kept alive abstract family");
1448 
1449  IAbstractFamily * new_family = family->clone();
1450  m_abstract_families[finder->second].reset(new_family);
1451  for(EntrySet::iterator i = m_entry_set.begin(); i != m_entry_set.end(); ++i)
1452  {
1453  MyEntryImpl * entry = i->second;
1454  if (&entry->getFamily() == family)
1455  entry->resetFamily(new_family);
1456  }
1457 }
1458 
1459 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
1460 
1461 Integer
1462 BasicIndexManager::
1463 addNewAbstractFamily(const IAbstractFamily * family)
1464 {
1465  std::map<const IAbstractFamily *, Integer>::iterator finder = m_abstract_family_to_kind_map.find(family);
1466  if (finder == m_abstract_family_to_kind_map.end())
1467  {
1468  // convention negative value for abstract family
1469  m_abstract_family_base_kind--;
1470  const Integer newKind = m_abstract_family_base_kind;
1471  ARCANE_ASSERT((newKind<0),("Unexpected kind overflow"));
1472  m_abstract_family_to_kind_map[family] = newKind;
1473  m_abstract_families[newKind] = boost::shared_ptr<IAbstractFamily>(); // this place will be used when the family memory management will be delegated to this class
1474  return newKind;
1475  }
1476  else
1477  {
1478  return finder->second;
1479  }
1480 }
1481 
1482 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
1483 
1484 Integer
1485 BasicIndexManager::
1486 kindFromItemFamily(const Arcane::IItemFamily * family)
1487 {
1488  IMesh * mesh = family->mesh();
1489  std::pair<std::map<IMesh *, Integer>::iterator, bool> inserter = m_item_family_meshes.insert(std::pair<IMesh*,Integer>(mesh,-1));
1490  std::map<IMesh *, Integer>::iterator mesh_iterator = inserter.first;
1491  if (inserter.second) // new element
1492  mesh_iterator->second = m_item_family_meshes.size();
1493  const Integer mesh_id = mesh_iterator->second;
1494  ARCANE_ASSERT((mesh_id<m_mesh_kind_shift),("Unexpected mesh overflow"));
1495  const Integer base_kind = family->itemKind();
1496  ARCANE_ASSERT((base_kind<m_mesh_kind_shift),("Unexpected kind overflow"));
1497  IItemFamilyCollection all_families = mesh->itemFamilies();
1498  IItemFamilyCollection::Iterator it = all_families.begin();
1499  Integer family_id = 1;
1500  for(; it != all_families.end(); ++it) {
1501  if(*it == family) break;
1502  if((*it)->itemKind() == base_kind)
1503  family_id++;
1504  }
1505  const Integer newKind = family_id * m_family_kind_shift + mesh_id * m_mesh_kind_shift + base_kind;
1506  return newKind;
1507 }
1508 
1509 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
1510 
1511 END_ALIEN_NAMESPACE
